Music
YoYo Sitar — Solo Afro-Raga Raga Voice Sound Journey
About Contact Press Kit

Raga + Voice

A classical-leaning concert with Indian vocals, exploring raga through melody, poetry, and shared improvisation.

An Indian classical vocal and sitar performance centered on raga — grounded in tradition while allowing space for living interpretation, expressive depth, and spontaneous musical dialogue.

What it is

  • A focused, listening-oriented concert rooted in classical raga form
  • Shared improvisation between voice and sitar, supported by rhythmic structure

Formats

  • Duo (vocal + sitar)
  • Trio (with tabla)
  • Classical ensemble (expanded, on request)

Best for

Concert halls · Cultural centers · Listening rooms · Classical festivals

Duration

60 / 75 / 90 minutes (flexible)

Technical

2–4 line inputs (depending on format). Full tech rider available on request.

Check availability / Book

﻿
